description_long: This is a detached residential house set on a large rectangular plot with a manicured green lawn extending behind it. The house features a white exterior with a gable roof and several windows, surrounded by a cluster of leafy trees at the front. A paved driveway or sidewalk runs parallel to the street, leading up to the main entrance, which is slightly elevated with a small set of steps. The property is bordered by a row of trees, providing privacy and shade to the front yard. The house appears to have two stories, with a prominent entryway and a compact, symmetrical footprint. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with ample outdoor space.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof, surrounded by trees and set on a large green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees lining the street-facing side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the green lawn and the cluster of trees near the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the backyard and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, showing both the house's rear and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, small porch, and flanked by trees
